reply:
Kisan bhai, aapke liye kai schemes hain. Maine kuch schemes nikale hain:

1. **Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana**: ₹50,000/hectare for organic farming over 3 years. Eligible: Farmer groups (minimum 20 farmers, 50 acres). Apply at: https://pgsindia-ncof.gov.in
2. **Pradhan Mantri Annadata Aay Sanrakshan**: MSP support and price deficiency payments to farmers. Eligible: All farmers selling at mandis. Apply at: https://agriculture.gov.in
3. **PM Kisan Samman Nidhi**: ₹6000/year direct income support to farmers. Eligible: Small & marginal farmers with cultivable land. Apply at: https://pmkisan.gov.in

Aap apni state bataiye, toh main aapke liye specific schemes bata sakta hoon. Abhi ke liye, yeh schemes dekhiye aur apply kijiye. **Kisanon ke liye, kisanon dwara, aapka bhavishya ujjwal banaye!**
